metadata.title: Le Divino — Restaurant | Agde
metadata.description: Traditional French cuisine restaurant in the heart of Agde. Fresh products, local flavors, and expertise.

welcome.title: Welcome to Le Divino, restaurant in Agde
welcome.description: In the heart of Agde city centre, on Place Jean Jaurès, Le Divino welcomes you in a warm and elegant setting. Discover traditional French and Mediterranean cuisine, crafted from fresh, seasonal products, elevated by our chef's expertise. Just 5 minutes from Cap d'Agde, our restaurant with its shaded terrace is the perfect spot for a memorable lunch or dinner.

cuisine.title: Local cuisine
cuisine.description: Generous traditional French dishes prepared with local and seasonal products, in Agde.

ambiance.title: Elegant setting
ambiance.description: A refined decor blending Mediterranean authenticity and modern comfort, with a lovely terrace on Place Jean Jaurès.

service.title: Attentive service
service.description: A passionate team at your service for a memorable experience at our restaurant in Agde city centre.

legal.liability_text2: The information on this website is provided for guidance purposes only and is subject to change. In particular, menus, prices and opening hours may be modified without prior notice.
legal.links_text: This website may contain links to other websites. Le Divino has no control over the content of these third-party websites and disclaims all liability for their content or for any damage arising from their use.

cookies.title: Cookie Management Policy
cookies.seo_description: Cookie management policy for Le Divino restaurant. Information about Google Analytics 4, consent and settings.
cookies.intro_text: The website www.ledivino-agde.fr, published by Le Divino (SIRET: 99935890600017), uses cookies and trackers. This policy informs you about their nature, purpose and the means at your disposal to manage them, in accordance with the ePrivacy Directive and CNIL recommendations.
cookies.what_text: A cookie is a small text file stored on your device (computer, smartphone, tablet) when you visit a website. It allows the site to remember information about your visit (preferred language, pages viewed, etc.) in order to facilitate your subsequent browsing.
cookies.essential_text: These cookies are essential for the website to function and cannot be disabled. They do not store any personal data.
cookies.analytics_text: These cookies allow us to measure website traffic and analyse visitor behaviour in order to improve our services. They are only placed after your explicit consent.
cookies.analytics_provider: Provider: Google LLC — Data is transferred to the United States under the Data Privacy Framework (DPF).
cookies.consent_text: On your first visit, a consent banner allows you to:
cookies.consent_refuse: Refuse non-essential cookies (only strictly necessary cookies remain active)
cookies.consent_customize: Customise your preferences by enabling or disabling each category
cookies.consent_duration: Your choice is saved for a period of 13 months. You may change your preferences at any time by deleting your cookies through your browser settings.
cookies.browser_text: You can configure your browser to accept or refuse cookies. Below are links to the settings of the main browsers:
cookies.optout_text: You can also specifically disable Google Analytics by installing the browser add-on provided by Google, available for Chrome, Firefox, Safari, Edge and Opera.
cookies.update_text: This cookie policy may be amended at any time to reflect legal or technical developments. The date of the last update is indicated below.
cookies.contact_text: For any questions regarding cookies or the protection of your data, please contact us:

privacy.title: Privacy Policy
privacy.seo_description: Privacy policy and personal data protection for Le Divino restaurant, in compliance with the GDPR.
privacy.intro_text: The restaurant Le Divino (SIRET: 99935890600017), located at 5 place Jean Jaurès, 34300 Agde, France, is committed to protecting the privacy of users of its website www.ledivino-agde.fr.
privacy.intro_commitment: This privacy policy is intended to inform you about how we collect, use and protect your personal data, in accordance with the General Data Protection Regulation (GDPR — EU Regulation 2016/679) and the French Data Protection Act (Loi Informatique et Libertés).
privacy.data_collected_intro: We collect the following data in connection with the use of our website:
privacy.data_reservation_desc: Last name, first name, email address, phone number, preferred date and time, number of guests, special requests (allergies, occasions).
privacy.data_contact_desc: Name, email address, subject and message content.
privacy.data_navigation_desc: Browsing data collected via Google Analytics 4 (anonymised IP address, pages viewed, visit duration, device type, browser). This data is only collected with your prior consent.
privacy.purposes_intro: Your data is processed for the following purposes:
privacy.purpose_analytics: Improving user experience and statistical analysis of the website (Google Analytics 4)
privacy.purpose_legal: Compliance with legal and regulatory obligations
privacy.legal_basis_interest_desc: (Article 6(1)(f)): for responding to contact requests and improving our services.
privacy.recipients_intro: Your personal data may be shared with the following recipients:
privacy.recipient_vercel: (website hosting) — United States, covered by Standard Contractual Clauses (SCCs)
privacy.recipient_google: (Google Analytics 4) — United States, covered by the Data Privacy Framework
privacy.recipients_no_sale: No data is sold or transferred to third parties for commercial purposes.
privacy.rights_title: 7. Your Rights (Articles 15 to 22 of the GDPR)
privacy.rights_intro: In accordance with the GDPR, you have the following rights regarding your personal data:
privacy.right_access_desc: (Art. 15): obtain confirmation that data concerning you is being processed and receive a copy.
privacy.right_rectification_desc: (Art. 16): have inaccurate or incomplete data corrected.
privacy.right_erasure_desc: (Art. 17): request the deletion of your data under the conditions provided by law.
privacy.right_restriction_desc: (Art. 18): request the restriction of processing of your data.
privacy.right_portability_desc: (Art. 20): receive your data in a structured, machine-readable format.
privacy.right_objection_desc: (Art. 21): object to the processing of your data on legitimate grounds.
privacy.right_withdrawal_desc: (Art. 7): withdraw your consent at any time without affecting the lawfulness of processing carried out prior to withdrawal.
privacy.rights_contact: To exercise these rights, contact us at:
privacy.rights_response: We undertake to respond within 30 days. In the event of a dispute, you may lodge a complaint with the CNIL (French National Commission on Informatics and Liberty) — cnil.fr.
privacy.security_intro: We implement appropriate technical and organisational measures to protect your personal data against unauthorised access, alteration, disclosure or destruction:
privacy.cookies_text: For more information about cookies used on this website, please refer to our
privacy.update_text: This privacy policy may be amended at any time. The date of the last update is indicated below. We encourage you to review it regularly.

restaurant-agde.hero_subtitle: Traditional French and Mediterranean cuisine, on Place Jean Jaurès
restaurant-agde.intro_title: Le Divino, your restaurant in Agde
restaurant-agde.intro_text: In the heart of Agde's historic centre, Le Divino is more than just a restaurant: it's an invitation to discover the richness of traditional French cuisine. Located on Place Jean Jaurès, our establishment welcomes you in an elegant and friendly setting where every meal becomes a special moment.
restaurant-agde.cuisine_text: Every day, our chef selects the finest fresh products from local Languedoc producers. From starters to desserts, each dish tells a story: that of a generous terroir, elevated by traditional expertise. Meats, fish, seasonal vegetables — our menu evolves with the markets.
restaurant-agde.ambiance_title: A unique setting in the city centre
restaurant-agde.ambiance_text: On Place Jean Jaurès, at the foot of Saint-Étienne Cathedral, Le Divino enjoys an exceptional location. The warm, intimate interior contrasts with the large shaded terrace overlooking the square. Ideal for a sunny lunch or a candlelit dinner.
restaurant-agde.terrasse_text: Enjoy our spacious terrace on Place Jean Jaurès, in the shade of the plane trees.
restaurant-agde.produits_text: Daily sourcing from Languedoc producers and the Agde market halls.
restaurant-agde.service_text: A passionate team that takes care of every detail for your comfort.
restaurant-agde.parking_text: Free public car park just 2 minutes' walk from the restaurant.
restaurant-agde.horaires_text: Le Divino is open 7 days a week. Find us at 5 Place Jean Jaurès, 34300 Agde — just 5 minutes by car from Cap d'Agde.
restaurant-agde.cta_text: By phone or online, book your table at Le Divino.

restaurant-terrasse-agde.hero_subtitle: Outdoor lunch and dinner, Place Jean Jaurès
restaurant-terrasse-agde.intro_title: The finest terrace in Agde city centre
restaurant-terrasse-agde.intro_text: Looking for a restaurant with a terrace in Agde? Le Divino offers one of the most beautiful terraces in the historic centre. Set on Place Jean Jaurès, beneath century-old plane trees, our spacious terrace is the perfect spot to enjoy quality French cuisine outdoors.
restaurant-terrasse-agde.terrasse_text: Our shaded terrace seats over 40 guests in an authentic Mediterranean setting. Facing Place Jean Jaurès and near Saint-Étienne Cathedral, you'll enjoy a unique atmosphere blending historic heritage and southern joie de vivre.
restaurant-terrasse-agde.dejeuner_text: At lunchtime, our sunny terrace is perfect for a gourmet break. Market menu from €24.90 with starter, main course and dessert — all prepared with fresh daily products. A real moment of relaxation in the heart of Agde.
restaurant-terrasse-agde.diner_text: In the evening, the terrace transforms. Soft lighting, candles on the tables, refined cuisine: the atmosphere is romantic and festive. Perfect for a dinner for two or with friends on beautiful summer evenings.
restaurant-terrasse-agde.saisons_text: Our terrace is set up to welcome you in spring and summer alike. In winter, our interior dining room offers the same level of comfort in a warm, cosy atmosphere.
restaurant-terrasse-agde.avantage_1: Terrace shaded by the square's plane trees
restaurant-terrasse-agde.avantage_2: View of Place Jean Jaurès and the historic centre
restaurant-terrasse-agde.avantage_3: Outdoor service from lunch to dinner
restaurant-terrasse-agde.cta_text: Secure your terrace spot by booking in advance.

restaurant-cap-agde.hero_subtitle: Le Divino — just 5 minutes away, in Agde city centre
restaurant-cap-agde.intro_title: The authentic alternative to Cap d'Agde
restaurant-cap-agde.intro_text: Staying in Cap d'Agde and looking for a quality restaurant? Just 5 minutes by car, Le Divino offers an authentic culinary experience away from the tourist hustle. Traditional French cuisine, fresh products, shaded terrace — discover the true taste of Languedoc.
restaurant-cap-agde.pourquoi_title: Why leave the Cap to dine in Agde?
restaurant-cap-agde.pourquoi_text: Cap d'Agde is full of tourist restaurants, but regulars know: the best tables are in Agde city centre. At Le Divino, no standard menus — our chef creates his menu based on daily market arrivals, with locally sourced products selected each morning.
restaurant-cap-agde.acces_text: From Cap d'Agde, take the D32E4 towards Agde centre. In 5 minutes, you're on Place Jean Jaurès. Free public car park 2 minutes' walk from the restaurant. A short journey for an incomparable culinary experience.
restaurant-cap-agde.trajet_text: Via the D32E4, towards Agde centre from the Cap.
restaurant-cap-agde.parking_text: Public car park 2 min walk away, unlike the Cap where parking is difficult.
restaurant-cap-agde.terrasse_text: Dine on the terrace on Place Jean Jaurès, in the calm of the historic centre.
restaurant-cap-agde.prix_text: Reasonable prices for quality cuisine, far from the tourist mark-ups of the Cap.
restaurant-cap-agde.carte_text: Traditional French and Mediterranean cuisine: meats, fish, Languedoc specialities. Market menu from €24.90. Carefully selected regional wine list.
restaurant-cap-agde.avis_title: What our Cap d'Agde guests say
restaurant-cap-agde.avis_text: Our guests from Cap d'Agde keep coming back. They appreciate the quality of the cuisine, the authentic setting and the warm welcome — a true discovery just minutes from the seaside resort.
restaurant-cap-agde.cta_text: Book your table at Le Divino and enjoy a memorable dinner 5 min from the Cap.
